rationale: Y is cleaner and closer to JICE-style descriptive clinical titles, with less repetition and a more precise anatomic term, ostial cross-sectional area. X is slightly more informative about the specific adverse finding, especially variant anatomy and enlarged area, but it is wordier and repeats pulmonary vein in a way that weakens readability. Overall, Y has the stronger title quality.
loser_weakness: X is overlong, repetitive, and less polished despite conveying the finding more explicitly.
